text:
Once upon a time lived a girl named Willow. Every morning she'd wake up to listen to her favorite whale songs. Her favorite whale? Orca. That's right. Orca Ow Ow Ow. She'd spend hours watching them. Even when winter hit—they seemed so... cozy.

One day, Orca decided to visit Willow. She didn't wanna go far. So she came to her favorite oak tree. They spent hours chatting. They even sung.

Willow? Orca? Well.

Then?

Oh.

Orca sang one last tune.

Aww.

Just.

They cuddled.

They're back!

They went home.

That summer. Orca visited four times. All the animals loved her. That's Willow. You? Oh.

Just?

Oh. You're great. I love you!

They sang.

Always.

And that's our story. Just wonderful.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
